settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Skinny Sips is Laushe's signature herbal weight-loss kehwa, crafted from a Sunnah-blessed blend of natural herbs and botanicals designed to boost metabolism, curb appetite, and support healthy fat loss — one soothing cup at a time.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Perfect for anyone looking to manage their weight naturally, reduce bloating, and feel energized throughout the day without relying on artificial stimulants or crash diets.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Targets stubborn fat and helps burn calories faster
Boosts metabolism to turn food into energy efficiently
Cleanses your body naturally by flushing out toxins
Supports a flatter stomach and smoother digestion
Reduces cravings and helps you manage portions better
Works seamlessly as part of your daily health routine

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Each box includes 30 sachets for a full month of use
Enjoy 1 sachet after each main meal, up to 3 times daily
Follow daily for 3 months to see lasting, noticeable results

settings.promo_banner: BUY 1 GET 1 FREE - Natural Weight Loss Support

settings.step2_text: Enjoy 1 sachet after each main meal, up to 3 times daily
settings.step3_text: Follow daily for 3 months to see lasting, noticeable results

settings.question: Can I use Skinny Sips without dieting?
settings.answer: Yes, Skinny Sips is designed to support your body naturally, even without strict dieting. However, combining it with a balanced diet and an active lifestyle can help you achieve faster and more noticeable results.

settings.question: How does Skinny Sips help with weight loss?
settings.answer: Skinny Sips works by supporting fat burning, improving metabolism, and helping control cravings. Its natural ingredients also aid digestion and detoxification, making your body more efficient over time.

settings.question: Is it safe for daily use?
settings.answer: Skinny Sips is made with natural herbal ingredients and is safe for regular use when taken as directed. If you have any medical conditions or are pregnant, it's best to consult your doctor before use.

settings.question: When is the best time to take Skinny Sips?
settings.answer: For best results, take one sachet after your main meals. This helps support digestion, manage cravings, and allows the ingredients to work effectively throughout the day.

settings.question: What results can I expect with regular use?
settings.answer: With consistent use, many users notice reduced bloating, better digestion, and gradual weight loss within a few weeks. Continued use supports long-term results and a healthier routine.

settings.headline: Start Your Slimming Journey Today
settings.subtext: Sip your way to a healthier, lighter you with Laushe's Skinny Sips Kehwa — pure, natural, and Sunnah-blessed.
